redshift.endpointaccess.vpcendpoint.CfnA: The connection endpoint for connecting to an Amazon Redshift cluster through the proxy.

redshift.endpointaccess.vpcendpoint.Netw.Description: One or more network interfaces of the endpoint. Also known as an interface endpoint.

redshift.endpointaccess.vpcendpoint.VpcE.Description: The connection endpoint ID for connecting an Amazon Redshift cluster through the proxy.

redshift.endpointaccess.vpcendpoint.VpcI.Description: The VPC identifier that the endpoint is associated.
